model_comparison: Both models accurately produce the text. Model 1 (T1) interprets 'Calm and Rational' as a flat, monotone delivery. While this is technically calm, it sounds robotic and lacks the persuasive nuance required for the 'Rational' aspect of the prompt. Model 2 (T2) delivers a much more convincing performance. T2 uses a natural, authoritative voice that conveys calmness through control rather than flatness, and rationality through appropriate emphasis on the logical structure of the sentence. T2 sounds like a real person handling a crisis, whereas T1 sounds like a synthetic readout. Therefore, T2 is the clear winner for its superior naturalness and more effective expression of the target paralinguistic features.
